label: About Me
heading:
"Obsessed with
craft & detail"
paragraph1: I'm a full-stack software engineer passionate about building modern web applications that combine exceptional user experiences with scalable backend architecture. I enjoy turning ambitious ideas into polished, production-ready products through clean code and thoughtful engineering.
paragraph2: From responsive React interfaces to secure REST APIs, authentication systems, databases, and performance optimization, I build complete end-to-end solutions with a focus on scalability, maintainability, and reliability.
paragraph3: I'm always expanding my knowledge of software architecture, backend engineering, and modern development practices. Every project is an opportunity to refine my skills, explore new technologies, and build software that's engineered to grow.
